issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Mintable ERC-20 token with owner-only mint
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses OpenZeppelin ERC20 + Ownable with the Ownable(msg.sender) v5 constructor and pragma ^0.8.20 as in the skill; baseline writes ERC-20 from scratch missing the audited inheritance pattern.

scenarios.name: Deploy to Sepolia testnet with Hardhat
scenarios.rationale: Treatment runs npx hardhat compile/test then npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network sepolia with ethers v6 waitForDeployment/getAddress; baseline uses outdated deployed() or generic instructions.
